_comment: CryptoBot Trade60 / Trade15 — reference config v2026-04-08
_trade60_doc: Stable growth: requires 1h UP + 15m UP + 6x live checks (10s interval)
_trade15_doc: Fast scalp:    requires 15m UP + 6x live checks (10s interval)
_exit_doc: Exit: live price only (no candles). Sell if drop >= drop_from_peak% from local peak
_live_checks_doc: 6 checks every 10 seconds. At least 4/6 must be rising to confirm entry
